introSection: Kiddies Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Turkish manufacturer DAL Amusement Rides Company currently located at Dudley Zoo and Castle in Dudley, West Midlands, England, UK.
fullText: Kiddies Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Turkish manufacturer DAL Amusement Rides Company currently located at Dudley Zoo and Castle in Dudley, West Midlands, England, UK.
